title: User can navigate back to the previous screen
test_steps: Click on the back arrow icon in the header.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the previous screen.

title: User can view the shopping cart
test_steps: Click on the shopping cart icon in the header.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the shopping cart screen.

title: User can view the details of the Essentials Bundle
test_steps: Scroll down to view the details of the Essentials Bundle.
expected_result: The user can see the image of personal care products, the text 'Essentials Bundle', the price '$35.95/month', and the subtitle explaining the subscription details.

title: User can view the 'MIX AND MATCH' section
test_steps: Scroll down to view the 'MIX AND MATCH' section.
expected_result: The user can see the text 'MIX AND MATCH' indicating the flexibility of selecting products.

title: User can view the phone number for cancellations
test_steps: Scroll down to view the phone number for cancellations.
expected_result: The user can see the phone number provided for cancellations.

title: User can view the price of the Essentials Bundle
test_steps: Scroll down to view the price '$35.95/month'.
expected_result: The user can see the price '$35.95/month' displayed.

title: User can view the image of personal care products
test_steps: Scroll down to view the image of personal care products.
expected_result: The user can see the image of personal care products arranged on a yellow background.

title: User can view the text 'Essentials Bundle'
test_steps: Scroll down to view the text 'Essentials Bundle'.
expected_result: The user can see the text 'Essentials Bundle' displayed.

title: User can view the subtitle explaining the subscription details
test_steps: Scroll down to view the subtitle explaining the subscription details.
expected_result: The user can see the subtitle explaining the subscription details.

title: User can view the 'MIX AND MATCH' section
test_steps: Scroll down to view the 'MIX AND MATCH' section.
expected_result: The user can see the text 'MIX AND MATCH' indicating the flexibility of selecting products.
